titles.title: Come Holy Spirit, Fall on Me Now - v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Come Holy Spirit, Fall on me now, I need Your anointing Come in Your power I love You Holy Spirit You're captivating my soul And everyday I grow to love You more.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm reaching for Your heart You hold my life into Your hands Drawing me closer to You I feel Your power renew Nothing compares to this place Where I can see You face to face I worship You in Spirit and in truth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I worship You in Spirit and in Truth
